text:
Created attachment 150273
Patch to the ports tree

I can't make compile this thing below 10.0-RELEASE. I mark it as broken in those systems (let's hope a C++ guru can send a patch).

Talked to crees@ about this looking for advice.

Attached are the patch and the poudriere log for 9.3-amd64
